turns: Hi, I'm calling to inquire about the recycling program in our area.
Yes, what would you like to know?
Can you tell me what materials are accepted for recycling?
We accept paper, cardboard, plastic bottles and jugs, glass bottles and jars, and metal cans.
Great, thank you. And what about electronic waste?
Unfortunately, we don't accept electronic waste in our recycling program. You can check with local electronic waste recycling facilities for options on disposing of those items.
Oh, okay. Thank you for letting me know. Is there anything else I should know about the recycling program?
You're welcome. Just to let you know, we also have special collection events for hard-to-recycle items like batteries and CFL bulbs. Keep an eye out for those in your community.
Thank you for the information. I'll definitely keep an eye out for those events.
Actually, I was also wondering about the schedule for regular recycling pick-up. Do you happen to have that information?
Our regular recycling pick-up is every Wednesday.
And just to clarify, do you have separate bins for recycling or do you mix all the materials together?
We mix all the materials together in one bin.
That's fine, as long as all the materials are clean and dry.
And if you have any other questions or concerns, feel free to give us a call anytime.
Thank you, I appreciate the help.
I'm glad I called to get all these details.
Actually, I was wondering if there are any specific guidelines for how to prepare the materials for recycling.
Yes, all materials should be clean, dry, and loose. Please do not bag your recyclables.
